---
title: "Grants & Research Projects"
---

## Current Projects

<!-- Add your active grants here. Example format:

### Project Title (2024–2026)
**Funding**: FONDECYT Regular Nº XXXXXXX · **Role**: Principal Investigator

Brief description of the project, its objectives, and expected contributions.

-->

*Section under construction. Active and past funded projects will be listed here.*

---

## Past Projects

<!-- Example:

### Validation of the BMSLSS in Chilean Adolescents (2020–2022)
**Funding**: Internal grant, UDP · **Role**: Principal Investigator

Psychometric evaluation of the Brief Multidimensional Students' Life Satisfaction Scale using Item Response Theory in Chilean youth.

-->
